summary: Fail. The repository cannot be passed because the required repo-wide gate `bash scripts/verify-all.sh` does not succeed in the current checkout.

Targeted verification for the new ordinary-program path and orchestration substrate did pass via `bash scripts/test-native-claspc.sh`, including `claspc run examples/feedback-loop/Main.clasp`, persisted pass/fail loop state, Dict/list/polymorphism/record ergonomics, event-log swarm kernel behavior, and SQLite-backed swarm control-plane commands. But that is insufficient because the repo-wide acceptance gate still fails.
follow_up: Make `bash scripts/verify-all.sh` pass in this environment, starting with the failing `scripts/test-native-runtime.sh` dependency on `rustc`.
After the repo-wide gate passes, rerun verification and only then reconsider a pass verdict.
